creator: ae@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Joseph Mulloy from comment #6)
> If there is anything you would like me to do to debug this please let me
> know.

Can you use only IPv6 connections and see in the `netstat -sp tcp` statistic what wrong? Also can you show the  output of `setkey -D`? 
I'll try to reproduce the problem with IPv6.
